{"notes":"

What's new

  • Sources replace Spaces — simpler setup. Your existing spaces will be migrated automatically. Just point at a folder and start searching.
  • Gmail Integration (Beta) — search emails and attachments alongside local files. Enable it manually in settings.
  • New /feedback and /help commands — report bugs, suggest features, or get help right from the search bar.

Plus: improved file previews, performance improvements, and various bug fixes.

Thank you for the continued support and feedback!
